user.title: Connect to Nature Remo
user.description: Enter a Nature Remo Cloud API access token. The default update interval is 180 seconds. Nature rate limits requests per account, so shorter intervals are not recommended.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Nature Remo API

abort.already_configured: This Nature account is already configured

init.title: Nature Remo options
init.description: The default update interval is 180 seconds. Each refresh uses multiple Cloud API requests, so shorter intervals can hit the account rate limit.
